gross_secondary_enrollment_pct.source: World Bank WDI 2024 · UNESCO Institute for Statistics
gross_secondary_enrollment_pct.label: Gross secondary enrollment rate (%)

internet_penetration_pct.source: World Bank WDI 2024 · ITU (International Telecommunication Union)
internet_penetration_pct.label: Internet users (% of population)

neet_rate_pct.source: World Bank WDI 2024 · ILO modelled estimates
neet_rate_pct.label: NEET rate — Youth not in education, employment or training (%)

vulnerable_employment_pct.source: World Bank WDI 2024 · ILO modelled estimates
vulnerable_employment_pct.label: Vulnerable employment (% of total employment)

gdp_per_capita_ppp.source: World Bank WDI 2024 · International Comparison Programme
gdp_per_capita_ppp.label: GDP per capita, PPP (current international $)

wage_floor_local.source: ILO Global Wage Report 2024 · ILOSTAT published tables · ILOSTAT 2024
wage_floor_local.label: Estimated median wage floor (PKR)

hci_score.source: World Bank Human Capital Index 2024 · Published report (SP.HCI.OVRL)
hci_score.label: Human Capital Index (0–1)

automation_delay_years.source: Derived from ITU Digital Development indicators via World Bank WDI
automation_delay_years.label: Estimated automation delay vs OECD baseline (internet penetration: 57.3%)

wittgenstein.source: Wittgenstein Centre for Demography and Global Human Capital · SSP2 Medium · 2025-2035
wittgenstein.label: TVET supply gap vs projected demand (%)
wittgenstein.note: Solar-installation demand grows 5.7%/yr in Punjab through 2035; current NAVTTC throughput covers 18% of projected need.

frey_osborne.source: Frey & Osborne (2017) automation probability scores · ILO LMIC calibration adjustment (2019)
frey_osborne.calibration_note: Pakistan's rural-agricultural context reduces automation risk by 20-28% vs OECD baseline. Physical, relational, and context-dependent tasks dominate informal markets.

solar_installation.source: ILOSTAT sector employment projections 2024 · Wittgenstein Centre SSP2
